title: CSS Responsive Design Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential properties and tools for creating web experiences that adapt to all device sizes.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a responsive, single-page application (SPA)?
Which CSS rule is used to apply different rules based on a specific browser window width (Breakpoint)?
Which meta tag is absolutely required to ensure a web page is correctly scaled on mobile devices?
What does the 'Mobile-First' philosophy advocate for in development?
options: Start by building for the most powerful desktop browser first.
Start by building the simplest mobile layout first and adding complexity for larger screens.

questions.question: Which CSS property is the BEST for making images fluid (never wider than their parent container)?
options: Both 'max-width: 100%' and 'height: auto' are best practices.
